text:
The product of two consecutive positive integers is 306. We need to find the
integers.
Rohan's mother is 26 years older than him. The product of their ages
111
(in years)
3 years from now will be 360. We would like to find Rohan's present age.
iV
)A train travels a distance of 480 km at a uniform speed. If the speed had been
8 km/h less, then it would have taken 3 hours more to cover the same distance. We
need to find the speed of the train.
